summary: The diff implements fixes for all three requirements: AdminGuard now shows a loading state while actor/identity initializes (REQ-2), AdminLoginPage uses programmatic navigate after login and invalidates query cache (REQ-3), and useIsCallerAdmin/useAdminExists hooks are updated to wait for full readiness before evaluating (REQ-1/REQ-2). All key acceptance criteria appear addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: Auto-seeding of hardcoded admin credentials in AdminLoginPage when no admin exists
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request any auto-seeding or hardcoding of admin credentials. The logic that automatically seeds the first admin password using hardcoded values was not mentioned in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Hardcoded admin email and password constants exposed in AdminLoginPage source
hallucinated_features.reason: Constants ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD with real credential values are hardcoded in the login page source. This was not requested by any requirement and represents an unrequested security concern.
